item.title:
so fun to see the reception to 5.5!
there is almost nothing that feels more gratifying to me than b...
item.description:
so fun to see the reception to 5.5!
there is almost nothing that feels more gratifying to me than builders saying they find our tools useful.
--- @sama | ❤️ 101 | 🔁 1 | 💬 36 | 👁 2559
item.author: @sama

item.title: btw polling software is broken! votes aren’t showing, as many folks have noted. eg I see none:
item.author: @GaryMarcus
